Brookdale Reno

Part of Brookdale Senior Living · Reno, Washoe County, Nevada

  • Memory Care

Contact & Location

Address
3105 Plumas Street, Reno, NV 89509 · Map
Phone
(775) 828-5000
Website
brookdale.com
Capacity
56 residents
Community size
Mid-size community

About Brookdale Reno

Brookdale Reno is a 56-bed memory care community in a quiet residential neighborhood of Reno, operated by Brookdale Senior Living. It uses Brookdale's Clare Bridge dementia care program for residents with Alzheimer's disease and other forms of dementia.

Care offered here

  • Memory Care — what memory care includes and who it fits

Care needs usually grow over time. Ask every community what happens when your parent needs more care than their current level — moving twice is hard on everyone. See levels of care explained.

Lifestyle & Services

Every community sets its own rules on pets, couples moving in together, and age requirements — and its own menu of medical and non-medical services, including transportation. Ask for the current policies and a full service list in writing; details here can change and anything unlisted should be confirmed on your tour.

Official Ratings & Inspections

Assisted living and residential care are licensed and inspected by the state, not Medicare. Look up this community's license and inspection history at the Nevada Division of Public and Behavioral Health, Bureau of Health Care Quality and Compliance.

How to read ratings and inspection reports — including what the stars don't tell you.

Do you work at Brookdale Reno?

Families make one of their biggest decisions with pages like this one — and nobody can describe your community better than the people who work there. If you're on staff or manage this community, you can update these details, answer short topic-by-topic questionnaires (each takes just a few minutes), and share photos of your community. It's free, and accurate listings help the right families find you.

Claim & update this listing

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11.
